steps.title: Find the slope of line k
steps.content:
Line k is given in slope‑intercept form $y = mx + b$, where $m$ is the slope.
$$y = 8x + 7$$
Thus the slope of line k is $8$.

steps.title: Use parallel property and point to get line j
steps.content:
Parallel lines have equal slopes, so line j also has slope $8$.
Because line j passes through $(0,15)$, this point is the y‑intercept, giving $b = 15$.
$$y = 8x + 15$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
